title: Irresistible
body_text:
How it works:
Drop a .json file on the canvas or create one from Tools → "The Recall"
The SessionNode validates via SessionManager.get_session_data(), shows filename, node/connection counts, and type breakdown
Dropping a .json on an existing SessionNode spawns a new one nearby
Click the import button → all nodes spawn near the SessionNode with fresh UUIDs, connections wired, and everything auto-selected for immediate group dragging
